zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Meringe於大約1367年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾梅爾時，她的父親Wiliam Mainwaring Mering24歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x23歲。她於1374年與Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford在英國德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Meringe于大约1367年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾梅爾时，她的父亲Wiliam Mainwaring Mering24岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x23岁。她于1374年与Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford在英国德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Meringe was born about 1367, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Wiliam Mainwaring Mering, was 24 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford in 1374, in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1405, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Meringe est née environ 1367, à Meering, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Wiliam Mainwaring Mering, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford en 1374, à Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1405, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.Brailsford, Derbyshire, England: Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Meringe um 1367 in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wiliam Mainwaring Mering 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x 23. Sie hat 1374 in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1405 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Meringe è nata il circa 1367 nel Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Wiliam Mainwaring Mering, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford nel 1374, nel Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1405, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Meringeが約1367年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングで生まれた時，父Wiliam Mainwaring Meringは24歳，母Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering xは23歳であった。1374年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブレイルスフォード グレンでSir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Meringe(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 노틴그함실르 메링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wiliam Mainwaring Mering(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에서 Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Meringe nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wiliam Mainwaring Mering, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford em 1374, em Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1405, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ro.Brailsford, Derbyshire, England: Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Meringe родилась около 1367 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Wiliam Mainwaring Mering было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford в 1374 г. в местности бреилсфорд грин, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1405 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Meringe nació aproximadamente 1367, en Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Wiliam Mainwaring Mering, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford en 1374, en Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1405, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
